name: Air Scoolbus Inc
registry_source: NY DOS Corporation & Business Entity Database (no match found)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER carrier record found under name 'AIR SCOOLBUS' or 'AIR SCHOOLBUS' (including begins-with searches). Address 5 Hillwood Ct, Thiells NY 10984 is a residential single-family home (Zillow/Trulia listings), suggesting a home-based micro-operator. The home was last sold 9/14/2021 for $505K. A separate 'SCOOLBUS AIR LLC' appears on nycompanyregistry.com but is a different entity (LLC vs Inc, rearranged name) and could not be confirmed at the Thiells address. Closest near-matches in SAFER (e.g., AIR B SCHOOL BUS TRANSPORTATION INC USDOT 1218485) are based in Miami FL, not NY. NY DOS public inquiry site requires interactive search and was unreachable via WebFetch (HTTP 403/socket errors). Recommend direct interactive search at apps.dos.ny.gov/publicInquiry and SAFER for definitive record.

name: RMR School Transportation LLC
registry_source: Florida Division of Corporations (Sunbiz) - Document #L21000477027, FEI/EIN 87-3456506
notes: FL Sunbiz confirms RMR SCHOOL TRANSPORTATION LLC, FL LLC, filed 11/03/2021, status ACTIVE, principal address 2381 17th St SW, Naples FL 34117 (matches input). Authorized manager Reinier Hernandez at same address. FMCSA SAFER returned no exact-name match for 'RMR SCHOOL TRANSPORTATION' (other RMR carriers found are in MO, GA, KY and not school-related). Possible the LLC operates buses without USDOT (e.g., intrastate-only small-vehicle), or under a different DBA. R & R Florida Transport Inc (USDOT 2174434) shares the 2381 17th St SW Naples address per QuickTransportSolutions but is a distinct entity with a different name. Sunbiz direct fetch was blocked (403). Recommend manual Sunbiz lookup and SAFER address search to confirm.
